title: AccountMemo
description: Structured account memo extracted from demo/onboarding call transcripts. No hallucination policy: all unknown fields must be null or listed in questions_or_unknowns.

account_id.description: Unique identifier for the account, e.g. ACC-001

company_name.description: Legal or trading name of the company

version.description: Memo version: v1 from demo call, v2 after onboarding update

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this memo was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last update (null if never updated)

timezone.description: IANA timezone, e.g. 'America/New_York' or common abbreviation 'EST'

notes.description: Any special notes about hours (e.g. 'closed on public holidays')

services_supported.description: List of service types the company handles (e.g. HVAC, plumbing, electrical)

emergency_definition.description: List of triggers that classify as emergencies (e.g. 'no heat in winter', 'gas leak', 'burst pipe')

emergency_routing_rules.description: Who to contact and in what order for emergencies

fallback.description: What to do if all contacts fail

order.description: Ordered list of contacts to try

non_emergency_routing_rules.description: Routing logic for non-emergency after-hours calls

action.description: What to do with non-emergency after-hours calls

callback_promise.description: When caller is promised a callback

call_transfer_rules.description: Technical rules for call transfer behavior

timeout_seconds.description: Seconds before transfer is considered failed

integration_constraints.description: Known constraints for service platform integrations (e.g. 'never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade')

after_hours_flow_summary.description: Plain-language summary of what happens when someone calls after hours

office_hours_flow_summary.description: Plain-language summary of what happens when someone calls during business hours

questions_or_unknowns.description: Fields that could not be determined from the transcript; must be followed up

notes.description: Short freeform notes about this account

extraction_confidence.description: Per-field confidence flags from the extraction engine
